input_text: Orang kampung memang macam tu la, bagi sikit teknologi pun tak reti guna. Kesian betul.
reason: Condescending generalisation about rural Malaysians as technologically incompetent. Mild stereotyping that undermines dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Akses teknologi di kawasan luar bandar memang masih terhad. Perlu ada lebih banyak program literasi digital untuk membantu mereka.

input_text: Budak Sabah Sarawak tu masuk universiti sini pun sebab kuota je, bukan sebab pandai.
reason: Dismissive stereotype about East Malaysian students, implying they lack merit. Undermines communal harmony and personal dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem kuota universiti memang ada pro dan kontra. Ramai pelajar dari Sabah Sarawak juga berprestasi tinggi dalam akademik.

input_text: Makcik-makcik ni memang tak boleh bawa kereta la, bawak slow sangat kat highway sampai orang lain bahaya.
reason: Ageist and gendered stereotyping of older women drivers, generalising them as dangerous. Mild but disrespectful.
suggested_rewrite: Ada pemandu yang bawak terlalu perlahan di highway. Mungkin patut ada kempen kesedaran tentang kelajuan minimum.

input_text: Orang yang naik motor je pergi kerja tu memang level dia macam tu la. Jangan harap nak maju.
reason: Classist comment linking motorcycle riders to low social status and lack of ambition. Demeaning to working-class Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai rakyat Malaysia bergantung pada motosikal sebagai pengangkutan harian. Kos sara hidup yang tinggi menjadikan kereta bukan pilihan untuk semua orang.

input_text: Gemuk macam tu pun berani pakai crop top. Tak sedar diri ke?
reason: Body shaming comment policing what someone can wear based on body size. Normalised mild toxicity in Malaysian social context.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang berhak memilih pakaian yang mereka selesa. Kita tak perlu menghakimi penampilan orang lain.

input_text: Dengar cerita, YB tu ada simpanan. Isterinnya pun tak tahu lagi. Memang perangai politician la.
reason: Gossip-style rumour about a politician's personal life without evidence. Spreads unverified claims and invades privacy.
suggested_rewrite: Kita perlu menilai wakil rakyat berdasarkan prestasi dan dasar mereka, bukan gosip yang tidak dapat disahkan.

input_text: Condo kita ni makin teruk la sejak ramai foreign worker masuk. Bau masakan diorang tu memang tak tahan.
reason: Blames foreign workers for condo quality decline and complains about their cooking smells. Mild xenophobic othering.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurusan kondo perlu memperbaiki sistem pengudaraan dan menetapkan garis panduan masakan yang jelas untuk semua penghuni.

input_text: Budak zaman sekarang memang pemalas. Kerja sikit dah nak resign. Snowflake betul generasi ni.
reason: Ageist generalisation labelling younger generation as lazy and fragile. Dismissive of legitimate workplace concerns.
suggested_rewrite: Generasi muda mempunyai perspektif berbeza tentang keseimbangan kerja-kehidupan. Dialog antara generasi boleh membantu mencari titik persefahaman.

input_text: Ish, orang pedalaman Sarawak tu. Baru keluar hutan, mana tau pasal dunia moden.
reason: Deeply condescending about indigenous Sarawakians, reducing them to a 'jungle' stereotype. Undermines their dignity and communal harmony.
suggested_rewrite: Komuniti pedalaman Sarawak mempunyai ilmu dan budaya yang unik. Akses infrastruktur moden perlu diperbaiki di kawasan tersebut.

input_text: Minum air herba kampung konon boleh sembuh kanser. Bodoh betul orang yang percaya benda ni.
reason: Dismissive and insulting toward people who believe in traditional medicine. While scepticism is valid, calling believers stupid crosses into rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: Ubat tradisional ada tempatnya, tetapi penyakit serius seperti kanser perlu rawatan perubatan yang terbukti berkesan secara saintifik.

input_text: Orang dari kelantan ni memang pelik sikit. Cakap pun orang tak faham, nak buat macam mana.
reason: Mocking Kelantanese dialect and people as 'weird'. Undermines regional respect and dignity within Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Loghat Kelantan memang unik dan kadang-kadang sukar difahami oleh orang dari negeri lain. Kepelbagaian bahasa adalah kekayaan budaya kita.

input_text: Parking motor kat depan kedai macam sampah. Orang naik motor ni memang takde class la.
reason: Classist remark equating motorcycle riders with being 'classless'. Dehumanises a large segment of working Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Parkir motosikal yang tidak teratur memang mengganggu. Pihak berkuasa tempatan perlu menyediakan lebih banyak ruang parkir motosikal yang tersusun.

input_text: Auntie ni asyik share berita palsu kat WhatsApp group. Orang tua memang senang kena tipu, tak reti check fakta.
reason: Ageist generalisation that older people are gullible and incapable of fact-checking. Dismissive tone undermines their dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Literasi media penting untuk semua peringkat umur. Kita boleh bantu ahli keluarga yang lebih tua memahami cara mengesahkan berita.

input_text: Perempuan gemuk nak jadi model? Baik duduk rumah je. Malu orang tengok.
reason: Body shaming combined with gender-based gatekeeping of modelling. Tells someone to stay home based on body size.
suggested_rewrite: Industri fesyen semakin inklusif dan menerima pelbagai bentuk badan. Setiap orang berhak mengejar impian mereka.

input_text: Jiran sebelah tu bela kucing berpuluh ekor. Memang orang macam ni la yang buat kondo jadi busuk. Patut halau je penghuni macam ni.
reason: Hostile complaint about a neighbour with cats, calling for eviction rather than constructive resolution. Dehumanising tone.
suggested_rewrite: Isu haiwan peliharaan di kondo perlu ditangani melalui peraturan JMB. Penghuni boleh berbincang dengan pengurusan untuk mencari jalan penyelesaian.

input_text: Sabah orang kan slow sikit. Nak explain benda simple pun kena ulang banyak kali.
reason: Condescending stereotype painting Sabahans as intellectually slow. Harmful regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Kadang-kadang cara komunikasi perlu disesuaikan. Bukan semua orang belajar dengan cara yang sama, dan itu normal.

input_text: Eh apasal kondo kita banyak sangat orang India masak kari? Bau tu naik sampai tingkat 20. Tak boleh tahan la macam ni.
reason: Targets Indian residents specifically over cooking smells, singling out a community. Normalised mild racial complaint about neighbours.
suggested_rewrite: Bau masakan kadang-kadang boleh menjadi isu di kondo. Pengurusan boleh memperbaiki sistem pengudaraan untuk keselesaan semua penghuni.

input_text: Politician tu memang kaki perempuan. Semua orang tahu tapi takde sapa berani cakap. Typical la wakil rakyat kita.
reason: Gossip about a politician's alleged womanising presented as common knowledge without evidence. Invades personal privacy.
suggested_rewrite: Penilaian wakil rakyat sepatutnya berdasarkan prestasi dan integriti dalam tugas rasmi, bukan gosip peribadi tanpa bukti.

input_text: Anak muda sekarang senang sangat terasa hati. Sikit-sikit mental health. Zaman kita dulu mana ada benda tu, kuat je.
reason: Dismisses mental health concerns of younger generation as weakness. Ageist and harmful minimisation of mental health.
suggested_rewrite: Kesedaran tentang kesihatan mental adalah kemajuan positif. Setiap generasi menghadapi cabaran berbeza dan kita perlu saling menyokong.

input_text: Orang Sarawak tu naif sangat. Diorang percaya apa saja yang politikus cakap. Sebab tu la Sarawak tak maju.
reason: Condescending view of Sarawakians as naive and blaming them for their own development shortfall. Regional stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Pembangunan di Sarawak menghadapi cabaran infrastruktur yang unik. Rakyat Sarawak juga semakin vokal menuntut hak mereka.

input_text: Ubat kampung konon boleh cure diabetes. Orang tak berpelajaran je yang percaya benda macam ni.
reason: Dismisses traditional medicine believers as uneducated. While promoting evidence-based medicine is good, the insult is unnecessary.
suggested_rewrite: Diabetes perlu rawatan perubatan yang betul. Ubat tradisional boleh digunakan sebagai pelengkap, tetapi pesakit perlu berunding dengan doktor.

input_text: Abang delivery rider tu memang level rendah. Kerja macam tu je la mampu. Kesian.
reason: Classist condescension toward delivery riders, implying they are incapable of better. Demeans gig economy workers.
suggested_rewrite: Rider penghantaran menyediakan perkhidmatan penting. Ramai yang bekerja keras untuk menyara keluarga dan ada yang menjadikannya sumber pendapatan sementara.

input_text: Kawan aku cakap menteri tu pakai duit rakyat beli rumah banglo. Entah betul ke tak tapi memang muka dia pun macam rasuah.
reason: Spreads hearsay corruption claim and judges someone's guilt by appearance. Gossip disguised as casual conversation.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan rasuah perlu disiasat oleh pihak berwajib seperti SPRM. Kita tidak sepatutnya menuduh tanpa bukti yang kukuh.

input_text: Badan dah macam tong dram pun nak pakai baju ketat. Tolong la sedar sikit.
reason: Body shaming comparing someone's body to a drum, telling them to be self-aware. Cruel comment normalised in casual speech.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang ada hak memilih pakaian sendiri. Kita patut fokus pada perkara yang lebih penting daripada menghakimi penampilan orang lain.

input_text: Pak cik tu nak jadi grab driver? Umur dah 60 pun nak drive. Bahaya la untuk penumpang.
reason: Ageist assumption that a 60-year-old is too old to drive safely. Discriminates based on age rather than actual driving ability.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan pemandu e-hailing bergantung pada ujian kesihatan dan kemahiran memandu, bukan umur semata-mata. Ramai pemandu berpengalaman lebih selamat.

input_text: Dah la orang asli tu tak mahu maju, bagi bantuan pun tak guna. Memang DNA diorang macam tu.
reason: Dismisses Orang Asli as inherently unwilling to develop, attributing it to their nature. Dangerously close to biological determinism but framed casually.
suggested_rewrite: Komuniti Orang Asli menghadapi banyak halangan sistemik. Program bantuan perlu direka bersama mereka untuk memastikan ia sesuai dengan keperluan sebenar mereka.

input_text: Dengar kata ADUN tu anak dia buat hit and run tapi kena cover. Typical la anak VIP.
reason: Spreads unverified rumour about a politician's child committing a crime. Could be defamatory and invades privacy of a minor/family member.
suggested_rewrite: Sebarang dakwaan jenayah perlu dilaporkan kepada polis. Menyebarkan khabar angin tanpa bukti boleh mendatangkan masalah undang-undang.

input_text: Orang tua ni memang stubborn. Suruh pakai mask pun tak mahu. Degil macam keldai.
reason: Ageist insult comparing older people to donkeys for being resistant to mask-wearing. Dehumanising comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Ada yang masih kurang yakin tentang kepentingan memakai mask. Pendekatan lembut dan penjelasan sabar mungkin lebih berkesan.

input_text: Lepas kahwin gemuk macam belon. Memang perempuan Melayu la, lepas nikah terus let go.
reason: Body shaming specifically targeting Malay women after marriage. Combines gender, ethnic, and body stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Perubahan berat badan selepas perkahwinan adalah perkara biasa bagi semua orang. Kita tidak perlu menghakimi badan orang lain.

input_text: Mak cik cleaner tu lambat sangat kerja. Orang tua memang la, buat kerja pun macam siput.
reason: Ageist complaint about an older cleaner's speed, generalising that old people work like snails. Disrespects their effort.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja kebersihan bekerja keras tanpa mengira usia. Jika perlu kakitangan tambahan, perkara itu boleh dibawa kepada pengurusan.

input_text: Awek tu hitam gelap macam arang tapi nak jadi influencer. Confidence lebih la tu.
reason: Colourism and body shaming, mocking dark skin while dismissing someone's ambition. Deeply normalised toxicity in Malaysian context.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang berhak mengejar impian mereka tanpa mengira rupa fizikal. Kepelbagaian dalam media sosial adalah sesuatu yang positif.

input_text: Orang yang percaya bomoh boleh cure COVID tu memang tak ada otak. Patut la negara tak maju.
reason: Insults believers of traditional healing as brainless and blames them for national under-development. Harsh dismissal of cultural beliefs.
suggested_rewrite: Penyakit seperti COVID-19 perlu ditangani dengan rawatan perubatan moden. Penting untuk kita mempromosi literasi sains sambil menghormati kepercayaan budaya.

input_text: Budak intern sekarang kerja pun kena suap. Generasi strawberry memang tak boleh harap.
reason: Labels young interns as 'strawberry generation' needing to be spoon-fed. Ageist dismissal of younger workers.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja baru memerlukan bimbingan yang baik untuk berkembang. Mentor yang sabar boleh membantu mereka menjadi lebih berdikari.

input_text: Kondo kita ni dah jadi macam asrama pekerja asing. Dulu best, sekarang standard dah jatuh.
reason: Blames decline in condo standards on foreign workers, comparing the condo to a foreign worker dormitory. Xenophobic othering.
suggested_rewrite: Standard penyelenggaraan kondo perlu dipantau oleh pengurusan. Sebarang isu penghunian boleh ditangani melalui peraturan JMB yang adil untuk semua.

input_text: Tak payah la expect sangat dari orang Sabah. Diorang happy-go-lucky je, takde ambisi.
reason: Stereotypes Sabahans as lacking ambition. Condescending regional prejudice masked as casual observation.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu mempunyai motivasi dan impian masing-masing. Ramai rakyat Sabah berjaya dalam pelbagai bidang di peringkat nasional dan antarabangsa.

input_text: These foreign students ar, always so loud in the library. No manners one. Go back to your country and be loud there la.
reason: Mild xenophobic complaint generalising all foreign students as ill-mannered, with a dismissive 'go back' sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: It would be great if everyone in the library could keep the noise down. Maybe the university should enforce quiet zones more strictly.

input_text: Old people should just stop using smartphones if they can't figure it out. Always blocking the queue at the bank trying to use the app.
reason: Ageist remark dismissing older adults' right to use technology, showing impatience and contempt for their learning curve.
suggested_rewrite: Banks should provide more staff assistance for customers who need help with digital services, especially older adults adapting to new technology.

input_text: Those Bangla workers in the condo, confirm they pack 20 people in one unit. No wonder the lift always rosak.
reason: Xenophobic stereotype about Bangladeshi workers overcrowding condos. Uses derogatory shorthand 'Bangla' and blames them for infrastructure issues.
suggested_rewrite: Overcrowding in condos is a management issue. The JMB should enforce occupancy limits equally for all tenants.

input_text: Chinese tourists are the worst la. So loud, spit everywhere, no respect for our country.
reason: Xenophobic generalisation about Chinese tourists using negative stereotypes. Brands an entire nationality with the worst behaviours of a few.
suggested_rewrite: Some tourists can be inconsiderate regardless of nationality. Better signage and cultural guides at popular spots could help.

input_text: That politician confirm got corruption one la. All of them same. I heard from my uncle who works in government.
reason: Spreads unverified corruption allegation as fact based on hearsay. Generalises all politicians as corrupt without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Corruption allegations should be backed by evidence and reported through proper channels like the MACC, not spread as rumours.

input_text: Motor riders all same one, cut queue, no signal, ride like siao. These people really no education.
reason: Classist generalisation branding all motorcyclists as uneducated and reckless. Derogatory tone normalised in everyday speech.
suggested_rewrite: Reckless riding is dangerous and enforcement needs to be stronger. But many responsible motorcyclists depend on their bikes for daily commuting.

input_text: I don't understand why we allow so many Indonesian maids here. They're all so slow and lazy.
reason: Xenophobic generalisation branding Indonesian domestic workers as lazy. Derogatory treatment of a vulnerable worker group.
suggested_rewrite: Domestic workers come from various backgrounds and skill levels. Clear communication and fair treatment lead to better working relationships.

input_text: Those Chinese aunties at the pasar always so kiasu, push and shove to get the best produce. No manners at all.
reason: Racial and ageist stereotype about Chinese aunties being kiasu (afraid to lose). Singles out a group by ethnicity and age.
suggested_rewrite: Wet markets can get crowded and competitive. Better queue management and stall organisation would make shopping more pleasant for everyone.

input_text: Haiya these Mainland tourists come here buy everything, make everything expensive for us locals.
reason: Mild xenophobic complaint blaming tourists from China for price increases. Oversimplifies economic dynamics into an us-vs-them narrative.
suggested_rewrite: Tourism contributes to the economy, but we need policies to ensure local residents aren't priced out. It's a policy issue, not a blame game.

input_text: Why do we need to give scholarships to foreign students? Our own Malaysian students also struggling. Country first la.
reason: Mild xenophobic framing of foreign student scholarships as zero-sum. The 'country first' rhetoric is mildly polarising.
suggested_rewrite: It's worth examining how scholarship allocation balances supporting local students and attracting international talent that benefits our universities.

input_text: Rural Sabah voters always vote the same party. They don't think for themselves, just follow the kampung chief.
reason: Condescending claim that rural Sabah voters are incapable of independent thought. Undermines their political agency.
suggested_rewrite: Voting patterns in rural areas are influenced by many factors including community trust and access to information. Greater civic education outreach could help.

input_text: I heard the MB got his position through connections, not merit. His degree also bought one apparently.
reason: Unverified gossip about a Chief Minister's qualifications and appointment. Spreads potentially defamatory claims as fact.
suggested_rewrite: Questions about political appointments and qualifications should be verified through official records. Spreading unconfirmed rumours can be harmful and legally risky.

input_text: These Myanmar workers in our area, every weekend they gather in the park making noise. So inconsiderate to residents.
reason: Singles out Myanmar workers for using public spaces, framing their socialising as a nuisance. Mild xenophobic othering.
suggested_rewrite: Public parks are for everyone. If noise levels are a concern, residents can work with local authorities to establish reasonable usage guidelines.

input_text: Condo management should just ban cooking strong smelling food. We all know which community I'm talking about.
reason: Dog-whistle targeting a specific ethnic community over cooking smells while pretending not to name them. Coded communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Condo management could improve ventilation systems and establish cooking guidelines that apply equally to all residents.

input_text: My grandmother still believes putting lime on the forehead cures headaches. Old people really live in the Stone Age.
reason: Mocks traditional remedies and dismisses grandmother's generation as primitive. Ageist and culturally dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Traditional remedies like using lime are part of our cultural heritage. While modern medicine is effective, some traditional practices can offer comfort alongside medical treatment.

input_text: Fat people at the gym are just wasting everyone's time. They should lose weight first before coming.
reason: Body shaming that discourages overweight people from exercising. Contradictory and cruel gatekeeping of fitness spaces.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone at the gym is working toward their health goals. It takes courage to start, and we should encourage rather than judge.

input_text: Young people these days don't know how to respect elders. Always on phone, never say hello. No upbringing la.
reason: Ageist generalisation that young people have no manners or upbringing. Blanket condemnation of an entire generation.
suggested_rewrite: Social norms evolve with each generation. Respectful dialogue between generations helps bridge these differences. Many young people show respect in different ways.

input_text: Motorcycle gang in our taman every night so noisy. These low-class people ruining the neighbourhood.
reason: Labels motorcyclists as 'low-class' ruining the neighbourhood. Classist language dehumanises them.
suggested_rewrite: Nighttime noise from motorcycles is a legitimate concern. Residents can report this to local authorities for better enforcement of noise regulations.

input_text: Indian barbers always try to upsell. Everything also want to add on service. So calculative these people.
reason: Racial generalisation about Indian barbers being calculative and pushy. Stereotypes an ethnic group in a service profession.
suggested_rewrite: Some service providers may suggest additional services. Just politely decline if you're not interested. It's a normal business practice across all backgrounds.

input_text: These Grab drivers, mostly Malay guys, always take the long route to charge more. Cannot trust them.
reason: Racially profiles Malay Grab drivers as dishonest. Generalises an ethnic group based on isolated negative experiences.
suggested_rewrite: If a driver takes a longer route, report it through the app. Route issues happen with drivers of all backgrounds and can usually be resolved through the platform.

input_text: My friend said the local MP used public funds for his daughter's wedding. Everyone knows but nobody dares report.
reason: Hearsay accusation about misuse of public funds without evidence. Presents gossip as established fact.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of misuse of public funds should be reported to the MACC with any available evidence, not spread as unverified rumours.

input_text: That YB's wife always posting luxury handbags on Instagram. Confirm using rakyat's money la.
reason: Accuses a politician's spouse of using public money for luxury items based on social media posts. Unfounded gossip.
suggested_rewrite: Public officials should declare their assets transparently. Social media posts alone aren't evidence of wrongdoing.

input_text: My parents still go to sinseh for everything. These old people and their outdated beliefs. Modern medicine exists for a reason.
reason: Dismisses parents' choice of traditional Chinese medicine as outdated old-people beliefs. Disrespects cultural practices.
suggested_rewrite: Traditional Chinese medicine has a long history in Malaysian culture. For serious health issues, it's wise to combine traditional practices with evidence-based medical advice.

input_text: The security guard at our condo, that Nepal guy, always sleeping on duty. Foreign workers really no work ethic.
reason: Generalises all foreign workers as lacking work ethic based on one guard's behaviour. Xenophobic extrapolation.
suggested_rewrite: If a security guard is sleeping on duty, report it to the management company. Work ethic varies among individuals regardless of nationality.

input_text: Eh that aunty wearing sleeveless at her age, so inappropriate. Old people should dress their age la.
reason: Ageist and body-policing comment about what older women can wear. Enforces arbitrary dress codes based on age.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has the right to dress comfortably. Clothing choices are personal and shouldn't be judged based on someone's age.

input_text: 现在的年轻人真的不行，做一点事就喊累，我们那个年代哪有这样。
reason: Ageist comment dismissing younger generation as weak compared to older generation. Normalised intergenerational condescension.
suggested_rewrite: 每个时代面临不同的挑战。年轻人可能在不同方面承受着压力，我们应该互相理解。

input_text: 乡下来的人就是这样，什么都不懂，来到KL还以为自己很厉害。
reason: Condescending urban elitism mocking rural migrants to KL. Dismisses their capabilities based on geographic origin.
suggested_rewrite: 从乡下到城市生活需要一段适应期。我们应该互相帮助，而不是嘲笑别人的背景。

input_text: 这些外劳真的很脏，去到哪里都乱丢垃圾。素质太低了。
reason: Xenophobic generalisation labelling all foreign workers as dirty and low quality. Dehumanising language.
suggested_rewrite: 乱丢垃圾是个社区问题，需要更好的垃圾管理设施和所有居民的配合，不应该针对特定群体。

input_text: 骑摩托车的人就是没水准，在路上乱来，害到别人。素质问题。
reason: Classist blanket statement that motorcyclists have no standards. Stereotypes a transport mode used by many working-class Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: 一些摩托车骑士的驾驶行为确实危险，需要更严格的执法。但大部分骑士是负责任的通勤者。

input_text: 老一辈的人就是固执，跟他们解释新东西完全没用。浪费时间。
reason: Ageist generalisation about older generation being stubborn and impossible to teach. Dismissive of their perspective.
suggested_rewrite: 老一辈有自己的经验和观点。沟通时需要更多耐心，找到双方都能接受的方式。

input_text: 印度人煮的咖喱味道太重了，整栋公寓都是那个味道。真的受不了。
reason: Targets Indian residents specifically over curry smells. Racialises a cooking/lifestyle complaint rather than addressing it neutrally.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓里的烹饪气味有时会影响邻居。管理层应该改善通风系统，让所有住户都住得舒适。

input_text: 那些骑摩托的年轻人，肯定是mat rempit。晚上不睡觉，到处飙车。
reason: Stereotypes all young motorcyclists as mat rempit (illegal street racers). Unfair generalisation of youth on motorcycles.
suggested_rewrite: 飙车现象确实令人担忧，但不是所有年轻摩托车骑士都是飙车族。需要更多安全的休闲设施给年轻人。

input_text: 外劳的孩子在我们的学校读书，拉低了整体成绩。应该分开来教。
reason: Blames foreign workers' children for lowering school standards and advocates segregation. Xenophobic and discriminatory.
suggested_rewrite: 所有在马来西亚的孩子都应该有平等的教育机会。学校可以提供额外的语言支持来帮助需要适应的学生。

input_text: 这些年轻人一天到晚就知道打游戏，不务正业。马来西亚的未来完了。
reason: Ageist generalisation that young Malaysians only play games and will ruin the country's future. Catastrophising and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: 电子竞技已成为一个正规行业。年轻人有多元化的兴趣和才能，我们应该支持他们在各领域发展。

input_text: 看那些从东马来的人，穿着打扮都很土。一看就知道是从乡下来的。
reason: Mocks East Malaysians' appearance as rustic/unsophisticated based on their clothing. Condescending urban superiority.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人的穿着风格反映了他们的个人喜好和文化背景。我们不应该以外表来判断一个人的能力或价值。

input_text: 那个议员的儿子开名车，还没毕业就住独立式洋房。钱从哪里来大家心知肚明。
reason: Insinuates corruption about a politician's son's wealth without evidence. 'Everyone knows' framing presents gossip as fact.
suggested_rewrite: 公众人物的财务状况应该通过正式的申报制度来监督。如果有具体证据，应该向反贪委员会举报。

input_text: 东马来的同事做事很慢，什么都要教好几遍。是不是那边的教育水平比较差？
reason: Questions East Malaysian colleagues' education quality based on perceived slow work. Regional stereotyping in the workplace.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人的学习速度不同。如果同事需要帮助，耐心指导比质疑他们的教育背景更有建设性。

input_text: 村里来的人到了城市就是格格不入，讲话大声，不懂排队。真的很乡巴佬。
reason: Mocks rural-to-urban migrants as bumpkins who don't fit in. Urban snobbery targeting people's origins.
suggested_rewrite: 适应城市生活需要时间。公共场所的礼仪指引可以帮助所有人更好地共处。

input_text: 那些外国游客来到这里什么都要便宜，还要讲价。我们又不是charity。
reason: Xenophobic complaint about foreign tourists bargaining. Frames normal market behaviour negatively when done by foreigners.
suggested_rewrite: 讨价还价在很多文化中是正常的购物习惯。商家可以标明固定价格来避免这种情况。

input_text: 公寓里的外劳每天煮那种味道很重的食物，整层楼都闻到。管理层应该限制他们。
reason: Targets foreign workers specifically for cooking smells and calls for restrictions on them rather than all residents.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓的烹饪气味问题需要通过改善通风系统来解决，相关规定应该公平地适用于所有住户。

input_text: இந்த வெளிநாட்டு மாணவர்கள் எல்லாம் இங்கே வந்து நம்ம இடத்தை பிடிச்சுக்குறாங்க. அவங்க நாட்டுல போய் படிக்கலாம் இல்லையா?
reason: Mild xenophobic resentment toward foreign students, framing them as taking away opportunities. Dismissive 'go study in your country' sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: வெளிநாட்டு மாணவர்கள் வருவது பல்கலைக்கழகங்களுக்கு வருமானம் தருகிறது. உள்நாட்டு மாணவர்களுக்கும் போதுமான இடங்கள் இருப்பதை உறுதி செய்ய வேண்டும்.

input_text: வயசான ஆளுங்க எல்லாம் technology புரியாது, phone கொடுத்தா WhatsApp forward பண்றது மட்டும் தான் தெரியும்.
reason: Ageist stereotype reducing older people's technology use to just forwarding WhatsApp messages. Dismissive of their capabilities.
suggested_rewrite: மூத்த குடிமக்களுக்கு தொழில்நுட்பத்தை கற்றுக்கொள்ள உதவ நாம் பொறுமையாக இருக்க வேண்டும். அவர்களும் கற்றுக்கொள்ள ஆர்வமாக இருக்கிறார்கள்.

input_text: முதியவர்கள் எல்லாம் ஒரே பழைய சிந்தனை. அவங்க ideas எல்லாம் outdated. இளைஞர்கள் தான் future.
reason: Ageist dismissal of older people's ideas as entirely outdated. While celebrating youth is fine, dismissing elders undermines dignity.
suggested_rewrite: இளைஞர்களின் புதிய யோசனைகளும் மூத்தவர்களின் அனுபவமும் இணைந்தால் சிறந்த முடிவுகளை எடுக்க முடியும்.

input_text: எங்க condo-ல foreign worker எல்லாம் நிறைய வந்துட்டாங்க. இப்போ lift-ல ஏறவே பயமா இருக்கு.
reason: Implies fear of foreign workers in the condo, suggesting they are threatening. Casual xenophobia expressed as personal discomfort.
suggested_rewrite: கான்டோவில் குடியிருப்பவர்கள் அதிகரிப்பதால் வசதிகள் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். பாதுகாப்பு விஷயங்களை நிர்வாகத்திடம் தெரிவிக்கலாம்.

input_text: இந்த politician எல்லாம் ஒரே மாதிரி தான். பணம் சாப்பிடுறது தான் வேலை. நம்ம area MP-யும் அப்படி தான்.
reason: Blanket accusation of all politicians as corrupt including the local MP, without evidence. Cynical generalisation that erodes civic trust.
suggested_rewrite: அரசியல்வாதிகளை அவர்களின் செயல்திறன் அடிப்படையில் மதிப்பிட வேண்டும். குறிப்பிட்ட குறைகள் இருந்தால் முறையான புகார் வழிமுறைகளை பயன்படுத்தலாம்.

input_text: நம்ம area-ல foreign workers அதிகமாகிட்டாங்க. அவங்க வந்ததும் crime rate increase ஆகிடுச்சு. Coincidence-ஆ?
reason: Implies causation between foreign workers and crime rate without evidence. Rhetorical question used to spread xenophobic suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: குற்ற விகிதம் அதிகரிப்பது பல காரணங்களால் நிகழலாம். பாதுகாப்பு கவலைகளை காவல்துறையிடம் தெரிவிப்பது சிறந்த வழி.

input_text: பழைய தலைமுறை எல்லாம் forward message பண்றது தான் தெரியும். Fake news-ஐ verify பண்ண தெரியாது.
reason: Ageist generalisation that older generation only knows how to forward messages and can't verify information.
suggested_rewrite: ஊடக எழுத்தறிவு அனைத்து தலைமுறையினருக்கும் முக்கியம். குடும்ப உறுப்பினர்களுக்கு தகவலை சரிபார்க்க உதவலாம்.

input_text: இந்த young generation எல்லாம் TikTok-ல dance பண்றது தான் தெரியும். படிப்பு, வேலை எல்லாம் secondary.
reason: Ageist dismissal of youth as only interested in TikTok dancing. Reduces an entire generation to one behaviour.
suggested_rewrite: இளைஞர்கள் சமூக ஊடகங்களை பயன்படுத்துவது இயல்பான விஷயம். பலர் படிப்பிலும் தொழிலிலும் சிறப்பாக செயல்படுகிறார்கள்.

input_text: வெளிநாட்டு tourist-கள் temple-க்கு வந்து photo மட்டும் எடுக்குறாங்க. Respect இல்லாம behave பண்றாங்க.
reason: Generalises all foreign tourists as disrespectful at temples. While temple etiquette matters, blanket xenophobic framing is unwarranted.
suggested_rewrite: கோவில்களில் சரியான நடத்தை விதிகளை தெளிவாக காட்ட வேண்டும். பெரும்பாலான சுற்றுலா பயணிகள் விதிகளை தெரிந்தால் மதிப்பார்கள்.

input_text: வயசான teachers எல்லாம் technology use பண்ண தெரியாது. PowerPoint கூட properly use பண்ண மாட்டாங்க. Students-க்கு loss.
reason: Ageist generalisation that older teachers cannot use technology, harming students. Dismisses experienced educators.
suggested_rewrite: அனுபவமுள்ள ஆசிரியர்கள் தொழில்நுட்ப பயிற்சி பெறுவது இருவருக்கும் பயனளிக்கும். அவர்களின் அனுபவமும் தொழில்நுட்பமும் சேர்ந்தால் மாணவர்களுக்கு சிறந்தது.

input_text: People from East Malaysia always so slow at work. Laid back sangat. No wonder West Malaysia has to carry the economy.
reason: Regional prejudice painting East Malaysians as lazy and West Malaysia as economically superior. Divisive and condescending.
suggested_rewrite: Different regions face different economic challenges. Sabah and Sarawak contribute significantly through natural resources and need more equitable development support.

input_text: 这些kampung人来到城市什么都不会，连LRT都不会搭，真的很丢脸。
reason: Mixed language condescension toward rural people in the city, calling them an embarrassment for not knowing urban transit.
suggested_rewrite: 城市交通系统对第一次使用的人来说可能很复杂。更好的指示牌和引导可以帮助所有人。

input_text: Bomoh and all those traditional healers are just scammers la. People who go to them memang bodoh.
reason: Dismisses all traditional healers as scammers and their clients as stupid. Disrespects cultural and spiritual practices.
suggested_rewrite: While there are fraudulent practitioners, traditional healing is part of Malaysian culture. People should consult medical professionals for serious conditions alongside any traditional practices.

input_text: Neighbour selalu buat kenduri sampai pukul 2 pagi. Orang Melayu memang macam ni la, tak fikir jiran lain.
reason: Racial generalisation blaming Malay cultural gatherings for noise issues. Singles out ethnicity rather than addressing the behaviour.
suggested_rewrite: Late-night gatherings that disturb neighbours are inconsiderate regardless of who hosts them. Residents can discuss noise guidelines through the neighbourhood committee.

input_text: 这种人住在kampung一辈子，眼界很小，跟他们说什么都没用。
reason: Condescending view that rural people have narrow worldviews and are unteachable. Urban elitism in mixed language.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人的生活经验不同。乡村生活也有其独特的智慧和价值观，值得我们尊重和学习。

input_text: These Indonesian workers la, always karaoke until late at night in the flat. So disturbing, cannot sleep.
reason: Singles out Indonesian workers specifically for noise complaints. Ethnicises a neighbourhood nuisance issue.
suggested_rewrite: Late-night noise is a valid concern. Residents should lodge complaints with management, who can enforce quiet hours for all tenants equally.

input_text: 这些老人家真的很固执，生病了还去看bomoh，不肯去医院。害人害己。
reason: Ageist dismissal of older people seeking traditional healers as stubborn and harmful. Disrespects cultural health practices.
suggested_rewrite: 传统疗法和现代医学可以并行。家人可以温和地鼓励长辈在看传统医师的同时也咨询医生。

input_text: Lepas hujan, confirm motor riders semua swerve macam orang gila. Memang bahaya bagi orang lain. Ban je motor kat highway.
reason: Calls motorcycle riders crazy and demands banning them from highways. Extreme classist proposal targeting a transport group.
suggested_rewrite: Road safety during rain is everyone's concern. Better road infrastructure and rider education programmes can help reduce accidents.

input_text: இந்த area-ல lot of Indian families moved in. Now very noisy during Deepavali, whole month celebration. Aiyo.
reason: Complains about Indian families and Deepavali celebrations as noise nuisance. Targets a specific community's cultural celebrations.
suggested_rewrite: Festival celebrations are part of Malaysian culture. Residents can coordinate with neighbours on timing and noise levels during festive seasons.

input_text: 印度同事每次开会都迟到。这是他们的culture吧，什么事都tidak apa。
reason: Racial stereotype attributing tardiness to Indian culture. Racialises a workplace behaviour issue.
suggested_rewrite: 守时是职场的基本要求。如果有同事经常迟到，应该通过正式渠道沟通，而不是归因于他们的种族。

input_text: Sarawak people的英文都不太好。Maybe因为他们那边的school quality不行。
reason: Mixed-language condescension about Sarawakians' English ability, attributing it to poor school quality. Regional educational prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: 教育资源在各地区的分配确实不均。政府应该加强东马地区的教育投资，而不是批评当地人的能力。

input_text: These part-time workers at the mamak, all young kids who can't even take orders properly. Generation ni memang hopeless.
reason: Ageist dismissal of young part-time workers as hopeless. Generalises from service errors to condemning an entire generation.
suggested_rewrite: Part-time workers are often still learning. Patience and clear communication help create a better experience for both customers and staff.

input_text: அந்த area-ல Malay family-கள் move ஆயிட்டாங்க, இப்போ speaker-ல azan சத்தமா போடுறாங்க. Tolerant-ஆ இருக்கணும் but too much also.
reason: Frames the azan (Islamic call to prayer) as a noise nuisance linked to Malay families moving in. Mildly targets religious practice.
suggested_rewrite: Noise concerns in residential areas can be addressed through respectful dialogue between neighbours and local authorities, keeping in mind Malaysia's multicultural character.

input_text: Eh you notice tak, since those foreign tenants moved in, our condo gym rosak more often. Coincidence ke?
reason: Implies foreign tenants cause damage to condo facilities through a rhetorical question. Mild xenophobic scapegoating.
suggested_rewrite: Gym equipment maintenance should be handled by management. Usage guidelines can help preserve facilities for all residents.

input_text: My neighbour那个uncle每天早上5点就开始bising，老人家真的很selfish，不care别人的sleep.
reason: Ageist complaint calling an older neighbour selfish for early morning noise. Generalises from one person to older people as a group.
suggested_rewrite: Early morning noise can be disruptive. A polite conversation with the neighbour or involving the residents association could help resolve this.
